purpose: Task-local formal-Recipe runtime distribution without upstream audit snapshots, raw extracted source code, reference-only candidates, or third-party curated reference images of unresolved redistribution status.

exclusion_reasons.assets/previews-curated: Third-party curated reference images are retained only in the upstream audit checkout and are not installed by the public runtime profile.
exclusion_reasons.assets/scheme-candidates: Reference-only candidates distilled from source blocks are retained only in the upstream audit checkout and are not installed by the public formal-Recipe runtime profile.
exclusion_reasons.assets/source_archive: Article snapshots and source/reference images with unresolved redistribution rights are retained only in the upstream audit checkout and are not installed by the public runtime profile.
exclusion_reasons.references/catalog.jsonl: The full source catalog contains extracted source code and article search text; it is retained only in the upstream audit checkout and is not installed by the public formal-Recipe runtime profile.
